name: Cacoo
description: Nulabs online diagramming tool (flowcharts, wireframes, ER) with API and embed, popular with Japanese engineers.

seo.title: Cacoo — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Cacoo: Nulabs online diagramming tool (flowcharts, wireframes, ER) with API and embed, popular with Japanese engineers.

when_to_use: ER diagram for a database schema with team collaboration
Shared system architecture diagrams for remote teams
Embedding a live wireframe in a Confluence wiki page
Flowchart creation for API workflow documentation
Real-time diagramming session for sprint planning

pros: Wide diagram types from ER to wireframes
cons: UI less polished than Miro or Lucidchart
review.verdict: Strong regional pick for Japanese teams but lags global alternatives like Miro on polish and integrations.
review.best_for: Japanese engineering teams needing API-embeddable technical diagrams
review.not_for: Global teams already standardized on Miro, Figjam, or Lucidchart
